title: Quantum Supremacy: Sampling Problems and Verification
description: Explore quantum computational supremacy through sampling problems, understand verification challenges, and analyze the evidence for quantum advantage.
learningObjectives: Define quantum supremacy and distinguish it from quantum advantage
Analyze the verification problem for quantum supremacy claims
Study the complexity-theoretic foundations of supremacy
Evaluate Google's Sycamore and other supremacy demonstrations
Understand the role of noise and error in supremacy experiments
